column7: Why selected over the alternatives
Learned lightweight blur/exposure/glare scoring; gates restoration so we don't waste compute or add artifacts on clean images.
ICCV'23 NTIRE 2024 runner-up; strong LLIE with public checkpoint; only runs when IQA flags low-light; behind an ablation.
One model restores composite rain/haze/blur instead of chaining three single-degradation models.
Apache-2.0 license-clean with DINOv2 backbone; strong on small/occluded/dense; fine-tunes well; YOLO/YOLOv12 are AGPL.
RF-DETR-L first real-time 60+ mAP COCO; Co-DETR is the AICC helmet rank-1 backbone; highest-precision second opinion on candidate crops.
Fast/strong comparator (40.6% mAP-N @1.64 ms T4) but AGPL-3.0 so kept out of the distributed submission.
Open-vocab label-free detection of rare Indian classes for the data engine; not the latency-critical primary.
HOTA 69.25 > ByteTrack 67.68 on MOT17; via boxmot so BoT-SORT/ByteTrack are drop-in fallbacks; IDs enable temporal violations.

column6: separate helmet classifier + separate rider-counting head; pure SAC/pose
column7: One scheme encodes helmet compliance AND rider count together; public dataset + proven winning recipes to beat.
All AICC winners converge here; detect motorbike @hi-res then crop then classify recovers small/distant riders.
Learned masks+pose give robust head->rider->bike attribution in dense overlap; VNPT heuristic kept as license-clean fallback.
Belt is a tiny ROI behind glass; two-stage crop is the only thing that works; honestly scoped to daytime.
Fixed cameras -> annotate geometry once; interpretable auditable court-admissible; needs no nonexistent labelled temporal dataset.
Cheap deterministic 3-state classifier on the signal ROI beats per-frame VLM; pairs with the geometry rule (red AND crossing).

column6: nothing (can't judge from a still otherwise)
column7: Monocular 3D yaw/ground-position lets wrong-side & stop-line be decided from one still; foundation-model role only.
Reuses the Apache spine; no extra AGPL dependency for one extra class.
+13pp E2E over v4; handles rotation/skew; v4 kept as high-throughput option; EasyOCR backup; ANPR is ROI-gated so accuracy wins.
State-code + HSRP regex rejects impossible plates and corrects near-misses; raises effective plate accuracy.
Independent OCR cross-check on low-conf plates plus make/model enrichment (UFPR-ALPR 83% plate/61% make-model); augments never replaces OCR.

column3: Temperature scaling + per-class thresholds + abstain band
column7: Calibrated scores + 3 bands (auto-confirm/human-review/discard) satisfy the assign-confidence ask and make auto-challan defensible.
Open-source; run only on low-confidence cases (cascade) -> precision + NL evidence without per-frame VLM cost (~200-1000x too expensive).
Tamper-evident versioned court-admissible; the differentiator vs a helmet-detector demo.
Lightweight searchable records + exportable reports + hotspot/trend views; fast to build for the MVP.
Open-vocab teachers auto-label rare Indian classes -> human spot-check -> distill into Stage-1 RF-DETR; runs offline off the latency path.
